name: Moonshae Isles
summary: Mist-shrouded islands of druidic circles, storm-battered coasts, fey crossings, old clans and sea-raider threats.
politics: Moonshae Isles is shaped by local powers, trade needs and old conflicts.
Adventurers can shift local balances quickly if they earn trust or fear.
culture: People of Moonshae Isles carry strong local customs and stories.
Rumour, reputation and practical help matter to most communities.
rumours: Something old has stirred somewhere in Moonshae Isles.
A recent disappearance has locals worried.
A merchant is paying quietly for reliable blades.
dmSecrets: A hidden faction is exploiting unrest in Moonshae Isles.
An old site nearby is connected to a larger campaign mystery.
